publicationstmt.publisher: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

change.item: This resource was modified by the ArchivesSpace Preprocessor developed by the Harvard Library (https://github.com/harvard-library/archivesspace-preprocessor)

repository.corpname: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

did.physdesc: Pamphlets, Newsletters, Newspaper articles, Photographs, Programs, Class directories, Broadsides.
did.abstract: Primarily programs and pamphlets relating to reunion activities of various Cornell classes.

defitem.label: Contact Information:
defitem.item: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524 rareref@cornell.edu http://rmc.library.cornell.edu

scopecontent.head: COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
scopecontent.p: Primarily programs and pamphlets relating to reunion activities of various Cornell classes. Also included are broadsides, programs, class directories, photographs, newsletters, correspondence, clippings, and other materials related to many classes and reunions.

prefercite.head: Cite As:
prefercite.p: Cornell University reunion miscellany, #41-4-361. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.

controlaccess.subject: Universities and colleges -- Alumni and alumnae.

did.unittitle: Cornell Club of NY Questionnaires & Reports, May 23 - Dec. 20, 1956
Alumni Magazines and Newsletters from Various Universities
Alumni Magazines and Newsletters from Various Universities
Cornell University Annual Class Officers Meeting, Jan. 9, 1965
